articles.title: Attorney general to review teen boys' rape sentences
articles.description: The three teenagers were not given custodial sentences for their roles in the rape of two girls.

articles.title: UK sees hottest day of year as bank holiday travellers face queues
articles.description: Temperatures hit 28.4C in parts of England on Friday, while delays have been reported at the Port of Dover and Birmingham Airport ahead of the bank holiday weekend.

articles.title: UK scientists developing Ebola vaccine that could be ready for trials in months
articles.description: The rare species of Ebola involved - known as Bundibugyo - kills around a third of those infected and has no proven vaccine yet.

articles.title: 'Stupid on stilts' - Trump's investigation compensation fund draws ire of Republicans
articles.description: The $1.8bn (£1.3bn) fund compensates individuals "unfairly" investigated under previous presidents.
